since_last: 50% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.59%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.94% · Gold -1.26% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 50% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.59%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.59%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +7.18%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +7.18%, SKHY +5.21%, AMBA +2.56%, CBRS +2.45%, DDOG +2.38%. Laggards: TSLA -5.53%, GOOGL -3.86%, AMZN -1.73%, NRG -1.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.08% at $116.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
